entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum Linn., the crop being studied for resistance to pod borer

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The pod borer pest that attacks chickpea crops

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain yield despite pest infestation

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to avoid or reduce damage from a pest

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of productivity used to determine tolerance and resistance

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The research approach used to study chickpea genotypes at ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The site where the field experiment was conducted

entities.name: PROTECTED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environment where crops are shielded from pod borer damage

entities.name: UNPROTECTED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environment where crops are exposed to pod borer damage

entities.name: INFECTED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environment where crops are actively attacked by H. armigera
